description_long: This is a visually striking chair with a standard metal frame and four straight legs, featuring a seat and backrest upholstered in a fabric printed with a realistic raw steak pattern. The seat and backrest are both padded, with the steak print covering the front-facing surfaces, while the rear of the backrest is plain white. The frame is constructed from tubular black metal, providing structural support and a modern, utilitarian look. The chair lacks armrests, giving it a minimalist profile, and the seat is wide and flat, suitable for comfortable sitting. The unusual steak-patterned upholstery makes this chair a playful and attention-grabbing piece, likely intended as a novelty or statement item in urban environments.
description: A metal-framed chair with padded seat and backrest, upholstered in a realistic steak-patterned fabric, and a plain white back. The chair is armless and visually unique, blending novelty with functional design.
description_view_0: Front-side view showing the steak-patterned seat and backrest, with black metal legs and no armrests.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain white back of the backrest and the black metal frame.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the thickness of the padded seat and backrest, and the steak pattern wrapping around the front surfaces.
description_view_3: Direct front view emphasizing the full steak pattern on both the seat and backrest, with the chair's open, armless design.
